caveats: Informational and educational only; not medical advice.
Does not diagnose disease or determine whether a person is infected.
Not a treatment recommendation or substitute for a healthcare professional.
Relative Maryland county-week Lyme forecast, not a per-bite infection probability.
Static seasonal prior; not a weather-adjusted forecast.
CDC national onset seasonality is not county-specific.
Surveillance/reporting changes and interventions are unmodeled.
Empirical intervals describe forecast uncertainty, not clinical confidence for an individual bite.
clinical_disclaimer: TickBiteRisk is for informational and educational purposes only. It is not medical advice, does not diagnose disease, and does not determine whether you are infected. Follow CDC guidance and contact a qualified healthcare professional about your situation.

explainer_placeholders.plain_language_goal: Explain why official Lyme data lag current prevention decisions.
Explain how new reports are compared with prior forecasts before updates.
Explain how validated observations could revise future forecasts with uncertainty and caveats attached.
Explain regional clusters, neighboring counties, and year-over-year hotspot movement without overclaiming migration or causality.

forecasting_status.public_score_role: relative county-week Lyme risk forecast with source-lag and update diagnostics
forecasting_status.update_policy: New surveillance, ecology, exposure, and calibration evidence are reconciled against prior forecasts and backtests before they are considered for future reviewed estimates.

method_summary: Selected annual forecast rows apportioned by CDC national MMWR-week Lyme onset seasonality.
product_framing: Lyme risk forecasting tool for Maryland county-week conditions
score_interpretation: Relative seasonal Lyme forecast on a 1-10 Maryland scale; not a per-bite infection probability.
